[binaries]
c = 'aarch64-linux-gnu-gcc'
cpp = 'aarch64-linux-gnu-g++'
ar = 'aarch64-linux-gnu-ar'
strip = 'aarch64-linux-gnu-strip'
pkg-config = 'aarch64-linux-gnu-pkg-config'
exe_wrapper = ['qemu-aarch64', '-cpu', 'max', '-L', '/usr/aarch64-linux-gnu/lib']

[host_machine]
system = 'linux'
cpu_family = 'arm'
cpu = 'arm'
endian = 'little'
